meta.title: Lia Giorgi — Traditional Tattoo Artist
meta.description: Book your tattoo session with Lia Giorgi. Traditional & Old School tattoo art in Malmö and Copenhagen.

booking.title: Book a Tattoo
booking.subtitle: Fill out the form and I'll get back to you soon.

description.label: Tell me about your idea
description.placeholder: Describe your tattoo idea, share references, style preferences...

reference.label: Reference images
reference.hint: Upload images that inspire your tattoo idea

booking.success: Request sent! I'll review it and get back to you soon.

deposit.info: A deposit is required to confirm your booking.
deposit.small: Deposit: 300 SEK / 30 EUR (for tattoos up to 3,000 SEK / 300 EUR)
deposit.large: Deposit: 500 SEK / 50 EUR (for tattoos over 3,000 SEK / 300 EUR)

about.title: About Lia
about.bio: Traditional tattoo artist based in Malmö, Sweden. Specializing in Old School tattoo art — bold lines, rich colors, timeless designs.
about.studios: Currently working at Studio Diamant in Malmö and Good Morning Tattoo in Copenhagen.

aftercare.title: Aftercare
aftercare.subtitle: How to take care of your new tattoo
aftercare.intro: Proper aftercare is essential for your tattoo to heal beautifully. Follow these instructions carefully.
